productDisplayName: Redtape Men Sporty Look White Casual Shoe
description: For the man who is smart enough to prefer quality along with a sporty feel, this pair from red tape is the right choice. Sleek design coupled with a comfort enhancing cut, this shoe looks every bit the understated sport shoe you always craved for. Wear this with washed black jeans from wrangler and your favourite t-shirt. This off-duty ensemble is perfect to wear for coffee dates in the evenings. Upper Synthetic leather upper with contrasting overlay lining along the midfoot and back foot Overlays on the toe box, midfoot and collar Central lacing system Padded tongue for comfort Padded and removable sockliner to accommodate an orthotic Outsole TPU outsole with herringbone patterned grooves Shoe care Wipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dust Use a branded leather conditioner to maintain shine Use a suede brush to dust suede surface Do not store in direct sunlight
